flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Morehead State University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (5.2k → 4.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Morehead State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Morehead State University rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (30.0% → 39.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Morehead State University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (44.8% → 52.2%).
